texto: With the compelling convincingness of dreams, which are vague yet exact, the ghost voice draws us (to ourselves and all of our component selves), lifts them casually out of the well of the past--the well wherein nothing is lost, the deep well of forgetfulness, and remembrance--and tosses them mockingly on the glassy table surface of our consciousness. There we are forced to consider them. There we are forced to regard, analyze, and re-understand.
explicacao: Citação de Heinrich Robert Zimmer sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “With the compelling convincingness of dreams, which are vague yet exact, the ghost voice draws us…” articula motivacao, self-awareness, reflexao em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
